creator: claes@griffel.se
text:
I have installed qt2.2.0 and licq 0.85 and I get every message that I try to send
to any one on my icq list gets splited randomly into two messages as if
licq thinks its too long...(10-14 characters) with qt2.1.0 I dont have any sucht
problem.

How-To-Repeat: Install qt2.2.0 and licq 0.85 from the ports...and try to send a message
too a person thru the server and you will get the same error
